text.message: Plowing twice enough ended my game
You might have to put up with some revenge
u went for only devs, and the second plow came 15 mins in the game?
u obv dont have a grasp of the game then
And you have no grasp of the social element of the game
If you think totally ending the game of someone who has access to loads of Devs is wise, I don't know what to tell you.
I'm never building two roads or getting 4VPs
You could have built to 6:2 instead of cutting across me
then why choose the dev strategy if u think its so hopeless lol
That would have limited blue's road
It's only hopeless once all 1 space build spots are taken by the same
